THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LATOUR, SALVATORE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 706 KEARNY ST. #135, S.F. $1,782.08 RENT, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,782.08, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PER COST BILL.
